panels.description: Unflushed prepared Arrow WAL slots held in RAM. Steady-state stays low (flush drains them); a sustained climb means the flush has stalled or WAL truncation is held behind a lagging peer's replication ack — the precursor to an OOM.
panels.title: Arrow WAL Cache Entries (unflushed)
Raft Save Vote Latency (p50 / p95 / p99)
Raft Apply State Machine Latency (p50 / p95 / p99)
Raft Append Log Latency (p50 / p95 / p99)

targets.expr: sum by (instance, peer_id) (hyperbytedb_hinted_handoff_enqueued_total{instance=~"$instance"}) - sum by (instance, peer_id) (hyperbytedb_hinted_handoff_drained_total{instance=~"$instance"})

panels.title: Query Error Rate by Statement Type
Query Latency by Statement Type (p50 / p95 / p99)
Query Latency by Normalized Statement (p50 / p99)
Avg Query Duration by Normalized Statement (Top 10)

targets.expr: sum by (db, stmt_type, stmt_normalized) (rate(hyperbytedb_query_duration_seconds_sum{instance=~"$instance", stmt_normalized!=""}[$__rate_interval])) / sum by (db, stmt_type, stmt_normalized) (rate(hyperbytedb_query_duration_seconds_count{instance=~"$instance", stmt_normalized!=""}[$__rate_interval]))
max by (db, stmt_type, stmt_normalized) (hyperbytedb_query_duration_seconds{instance=~"$instance", stmt_normalized!="", quantile="0.99"})
